name: Engage.Http

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
Configuration type

  - `baseUrl` the base URL for Http request
  - `headers`: `list of the header for Http request

values.name: delete
values.type: Config -> { methodName : String, value : Value } -> Task Never (WebData String)

values.name: get
values.type: Config -> Decoder success -> { methodName : String, queryStringParams : List ( String, String ) } -> Task Never (WebData success)

values.name: getErrorMessage
values.comment: Get the localized error message from the `Http.Error`

values.name: multipleServerErrorDecoder
values.comment: Json decoder for multiple server error messages, localized.

values.name: nullDecoder
values.comment: Null decoder. Useful for when the server doesn't return any value.

values.name: patch
values.type: Config -> Decoder success -> { methodName : String, value : Value } -> Task Never (WebData success)

values.name: post
values.type: Config -> Decoder success -> { methodName : String, value : Value } -> Task Never (WebData success)

values.name: put
values.type: Config -> Decoder success -> { methodName : String, value : Value } -> Task Never (WebData success)

values.name: serverErrorDecoder
values.comment: Json decoder for server error, localized.
